Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Claims RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 68 

COPAY_PD_DT 

LABEL: Beneficiary Copayment Paid Date 

DESCRIPTION: The date the beneficiary paid the copayment amount. 

SHORT NAME: COPAY_PD_DT 

LONG NAME: COPAY_PD_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Analytic File (TAF) claims 

FILE(S): OT header 

VALUES: Date (numeric, system dependent) 
Null/missing = Source value is missing or unknown 

COMMENT: —
